title: Wave 3 opening gate

review_policy.note: Per user instruction, full Claude review execution is skipped going forward and must not be counted as a valid review receipt.

tuw_evidence.title: Wave 3 opening gate definition

commands.command: grep -c "^| W3-GROUP-" docs/launch/wave3-opening-gate.md && grep -c "^| W3-PORTAL-" docs/launch/wave3-opening-gate.md && grep -c "^| W3-HR-" docs/launch/wave3-opening-gate.md && grep -c "Wave 3 기능 구현은 본 게이트 범위 밖" docs/launch/wave3-opening-gate.md
commands.purpose: Verify the Wave 3 gate defines five feature groups, Portal preconditions, HR preconditions, and explicit implementation out-of-scope boundary

commands.command: grep -c "^| W3-REJUDGE-" docs/launch/wave3-opening-gate.md && grep -c "^| W3-EVID-" docs/launch/wave3-opening-gate.md
commands.purpose: Verify G3/G6/G7 rejudgment and evidence package contract rows
Launch TUW workbook ledger integrity check

notes: This is a gate definition draft only and does not implement or activate Wave 3 features.
External identity, portal link controls, HR sensitivity verification, deterministic rule engine evidence, OQ-006, and owner signoff remain pending.
LT-L9-W05 remains open pending T02 feature-group rejudgment/signoff.

tuw_evidence.title: Wave 3 기능군별 개방 재판정·사인오프·증거 조립
tuw_evidence.objective: 기능군별 G3/G6/G7 차원 재판정이 수행되고, HR 직원 실데이터 투입 전 HR sensitivity 검증·deterministic rule engine 확인 증적이 통과 조건으로 판정되며, 기능군별 사인오프와 wave 게이트 통과 기록·W05 증거가 조립된다. Wave 3 기능군 구현은 본 TUW 범위 밖이다.
acceptance_criteria: 기능군별 재판정 기록 5건(각각 G3/G6/G7 증거 링크 포함, pass 또는 보류 판정)이 존재한다.
HR 기능군 판정에 HR sensitivity 검증 결과·deterministic rule engine 확인·OQ-006 결정 링크가 전부 존재하고, 실데이터 투입 승인이 그 충족 후에만 기록되어 있다.
기능군별 사인오프 아티팩트(승인자·일자) 또는 보류 finding이 5건 전부에 존재한다.

verification_contract.method: 1) 판정 기록 기능군 카운트(=5)·증거 링크 해석 확인 2) HR 판정의 선행 증적 3종 링크 확인 3) 사인오프/finding 카운트(=5) 4) 증거 5종 ls 확인

tuw_evidence.blocked_reason: This TUW is represented for coverage only. Required deliverables and acceptance criteria remain blocked or pending until real evidence or owner-approved deferral coverage exists.
tuw_evidence.required_next_action: Provide real completion evidence for this TUW, or record valid owner-approved deferral coverage in docs/launch/launch-decision-register.md.
notes: No completion, production readiness, go-live approval, owner approval, or owner deferral is claimed by this coverage row.
Full Claude review remains waived by user instruction and is not valid review evidence.

blocked_claims: This record does not claim LT-L9-W05 or LT-L9-W05-T01 is complete.
This record does not enable portal access, HR real data, Obsidian export, billing automation, or DLP enforcement.
This record does not provide feature-level owner signoff or G3/G6/G7 rejudgment evidence.
This record does not count the user review waiver as a valid Claude review receipt.
